_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: Thirty-one targets of Etv5 are differentially expressed in 3-month-old murine OPG-1 RNA-Seq samples... p-values adjusted using Benjamini-Hochberg
details: Successfully identified 31 differentially expressed Etv5 target genes with adjusted p-values and log2 fold changes in 3-month-old murine OPG-1 samples
